description: Private AI reasoning agent with public verifiable actions. Separates sensitive reasoning from public outputs using hash-based cryptographic proofs. Think privately, act publicly, prove everything.

supported_tools.name: reason_privately
supported_tools.description: Reason over sensitive data privately — input hashed, reasoning in-memory only, output public-safe

supported_tools.name: verify_session
supported_tools.description: Verify a private reasoning session's integrity via hash chain validation

supported_tools.name: commitSession
supported_tools.description: Commit private reasoning session hashes to on-chain PrivacyVault (never raw data)

supported_tools.name: verifySession
supported_tools.description: Verify on-chain that a session hash matches the committed proof

supported_tools.name: getSessionCount
supported_tools.description: Query how many private reasoning sessions have been committed on-chain

supported_tools.name: venice_chat
supported_tools.description: Zero-storage LLM inference via Venice API — provider retains nothing

tech_stack.cryptography: SHA-256 hash chains for proof generation

compute_constraints.privacy_guarantee: Even the LLM provider retains nothing — no logs, no training data, no traces
compute_constraints.reasoning_storage: in-memory only — never persisted to disk
compute_constraints.on_chain_data: hashes only — raw data never touches the blockchain

privacy_model.input: SHA-256 hashed — proves what was analyzed without revealing it
privacy_model.reasoning: in-memory only — never persisted, never stored
privacy_model.proof: cryptographic hash chain — proves computation happened honestly
privacy_model.on_chain: hashes committed to PrivacyVault — verifiable without revealing content
